channel.title: Santé on Info connectée
channel.description: Recent content in Santé on Info connectée

item.title: Healthy Tuesdays: Fruit and Veggie Snacks
item.description: Eating healthy is important for our growth and energy! That is why every Tuesday, snack time is dedicated to fruits and vegetables. All students are encouraged to bring their favorite healthy treats to share or enjoy. Let’s keep up the good habits for a healthy school year! - By the Editorial Team
